title: Spicy Turkish Seafood Stew
description: A flavorful and spicy stew originating from the Turkish coast, featuring a medley of seafood and a hint of Asian flair. This dish can be served over rice or with some crusty bread.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add garlic and ginger and sauté for 1 minute.
Add spicy Korean chili flakes and cook for another minute.
Add mussels, shrimp, and lobster meat. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Pour in fish stock and add Turkish red pepper paste.
Stir well and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-12 minutes or until seafood is cooked.
Stir in lemon juice and season with salt and pepper.
Serve hot over rice or with crusty bread.
